They also list the Certification status of all organic farms and businesses in the U.S."}, {"title": "Certified organic farms in U.S. by state 2021 | Statista", "url": "https://www.statista.com/statistics/677447/certified-organic-farms-in-us-by-state/", "snippet": "November 29, 2025 -Industry-specific and extensively researched technical data (partially from exclusive partnerships).
